name: Prime M3U8 Downloader
description: Download M3U8 video streams and convert them to MP4 using Node, BullMQ, Redis, and FFmpeg.

JWT_SECRET.description: Secret key for signing JWT tokens

FRONTEND_URL.description: Public URL of the Downloader application (e.g. https://your-downloader-app.herokuapp.com). Used for CORS.

NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL.description: Public API URL of the Downloader application (same as FRONTEND_URL). Make sure it starts with https://.

TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN.description: Telegram Bot Token for logging notifications. Leave empty to disable.

TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID.description: Telegram Chat/Logger Group ID. Leave empty to disable.
